knowledge/mattpocock-skills-comparison-2.description: Reference: structure of mattpocock/skills (34 skills/6 buckets, plugin-packaged) + comparison vs our harness. Standout: writing-great-skills authoring principles (leading words, kill no-ops, predictability), invocation-axis type system, .out-of-scope rejection memory, git-guardrails hook. Two-signal observation: both 9arm + mattpocock ship leaner skills than ours.

knowledge/9arm-skills-upstream-compariso.description: Reference: structure of upstream thananon/9arm-skills repo + skill-by-skill comparison vs our harness. Key insight: qwenchance counts signals instead of estimating tokens (sidesteps the CFP-028/031/037/041 estimation bug class). scrutinize/debug gaps (Trace+Verify, fail-path ladder). qwen-agent simpler than T-218 plan.

knowledge/bc_coverage.md.description: Behavior Contract coverage tracker â€” all 42 BCs across harness (CLAUDE/AGENTS/skills) with tested/untested status cross-referenced from behave_test_log.jsonl

knowledge/telemetry-schema-harness-2026-.description: Harness-specific token telemetry JSON schema and dashboard queries

.agents/skills/harness/harness_editor/SK.description: Harness Editor skill â€” manages edits to CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, SKILL.md files, knowledge/, Implement/ with mandatory MECE plan gate and full close sequence.
.agents/skills/harness/harness_editor/SK.summary: Harness Editor manages all edits to core configuration files (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, SKILL.md, knowledge/, Implement/) using mandatory MECE planning and verifying a five-element behavioral contract after each change.
key_claims: mece_plan.md dated today required before any file edit
File Size Contract enforces maximum line limits per file type
harness_flow and Implement/ documentation must update in same task
[pre-edit] emit mandatory before every Edit tool call

scripts/token_estimator.py.description: Token estimator â€” SESSION_TOTAL + CHAT_TOTAL formula per R1. Callable via Bash.
scripts/token_estimator.py.summary: Token estimator provides command-line utilities for SESSION_TOTAL and CHAT_TOTAL estimation using measured character multipliers and configurable simulation for planning long sessions.
key_claims: Thai characters multiply at 1.7 tokens per character
English characters multiply at 0.3 tokens per character
supports --simulate flag for multi-turn projection
constants derived from measured Claude app session data

.agents/skills/harness/harness_doctor/SK.description: Structural fix agent for recurring CFP patterns â€” diagnose â†’ propose â†’ wait approval â†’ execute. Delegates SKILL.md file edits to harness_editor.
.agents/skills/harness/harness_doctor/SK.summary: Harness Doctor fixes recurring CFP patterns that reoccurred after a prior fix was applied by reading index_cfp_fix.json, proposing structural changes, and enforcing harness conventions.
key_claims: triggers on recurred_after_fix array non-empty in index
first-time CFP without prior fix attempt refused
structural fixes must follow harness behavioral contract
updates CODING_FAILURE_PATTERNS with fix attempt metadata

CLAUDE.md.description: Master hard constraints â€” R1â€“R16, R-Roadmap, Boot gates. Read first by every agent, every session.
CLAUDE.md.summary: CLAUDE.md defines hard constraints and gates for all agents including mandatory boot sequence, token tracking formulas, MECE planning requirements, and phase transition rules.
key_claims: SESSION_TOTAL resets to zero at session start before any work
compact_size equals CHAT_TOTAL pre-compact times 0.52
B1 resets SESSION_TOTAL=0 on fresh session start
Never-Full-Load rule prohibits reading large index files in full
Phase Transition Gate requires gather_complete.md and mece_plan.md today

AGENTS.md.description: Agent orientation â€” Boot sequence B1-B4, Per-Turn Routing C0-C3, Loop Architecture Phases 1-3.
AGENTS.md.summary: AGENTS.md provides complete agent orientation including boot sequence implementation, per-turn routing logic, three-phase loop architecture (Gather, MECE Plan, Execution), and sub-agent delegation rules.
key_claims: B1 bash resets SESSION_TOTAL=0 and initializes CHAT_TOTAL at boot
sys_fixed computed dynamically as CLAUDE.md + AGENTS.md chars times 0.3 plus 3500
compact_size formula uses 0.52 multiplier on pre-compact CHAT_TOTAL
hooks_per_turn equals 700 tokens for harness reminders and tools
per-turn growth formula CHAT_TOTAL += 700 plus turn_tokens times 1.3

.agents/skills/skill-manifest.json.description: Machine-readable skill routing â€” keyword â†’ skill mapping, on_demand_files, boot_read_policy. Read at Boot B2.
.agents/skills/skill-manifest.json.summary: Skill manifest is machine-readable routing table that agents read at Boot B2 via keyword matching to load skills, and explicitly prohibits auto-loading on_demand_files at B3.
key_claims: on_demand_files used for G2 lookup only never at B3 boot
boot_read_policy specifies which files legal to read at each boot stage
never_at_boot list includes all index_variables and index_files JSON
B3 reads SKILL.md offset 1 limit 80 for sections only

.agents/skills/registry.md.description: Fast-match keywordâ†’skill table + micro-rules. Secondary routing after skill-manifest.json.
.agents/skills/registry.md.summary: Skill Registry provides keyword-to-skill fast-match table and micro-rules for each skill, used after skill-manifest.json keyword matching and before loading full SKILL.md.
key_claims: fast-match keywords route to specific skill names automatically
fix and bug keywords load editor skill with R7 first
hard constraints are always active regardless of loaded skill
learned_routes automatically updated for repeated keyword matches

knowledge/harness_flow_20260526.md.description: Main harness architecture flow diagram â€” Layer 0-3, Boot, Per-Turn Routing, Phase 1-3, signal glossary, patch history.
knowledge/harness_flow_20260526.md.summary: Harness Complete Flow is the definitive reference documenting post-fix harness architecture, token formula accuracy improvements through T-046, and completion gate behavior.
key_claims: compact_size ratio improved from 0.30 to 0.45 in T-044 fix
hooks_per_turn reduced from 1300 to 700 based on actual measurement
T-046 applies triangular correction factor of 1.3 to per-turn growth
system_fixed computed dynamically instead of hardcoded 7300
T-045 validated accuracy at 1.26x undercount versus API baseline

knowledge/index_variables.json.description: Symbol index â€” component/function/hook definitions + used_in[] backlinks. Never-full-load: grep only.
knowledge/index_variables.json.summary: Index variables tracks all defined symbols and variables across the codebase with their location, usage count, and related references for refactoring safety checks.

enables safe refactoring by tracking all symbol occurrences
must be updated when any symbol is created or renamed

knowledge/index_cfp_fix.json.description: CFP occurrence + fix tracking index â€” recurrence count, last_fixed_session, status per CFP-XXX.
knowledge/index_cfp_fix.json.summary: Index CFP fix tracks known coding failure patterns, their fix attempts, recurrence count, and current status to prevent repeating same failures.
key_claims: status field tracks active or resolved failure patterns
recurred_after_fix array counts how many times fix was applied again
harness_doctor uses this index to identify structural issues
each CFP entry maps to corresponding CODING_FAILURE_PATTERNS.md section

knowledge/index_sessions.json.description: Session history index â€” task summaries, files_changed[], lookup.py --session oracle source.
knowledge/index_sessions.json.summary: Index sessions catalogs all completed sessions with their metadata, keywords, and summaries for session history lookup and context restoration.
key_claims: tracks session status completed or in_progress for each entry
keywords extracted from session content enable full-text search
summary field truncated to aid discovery without re-reading files
files_changed list tracks which source files were modified per session

knowledge/error_index.md.description: ERR-XXX error code registry â€” symptom, root cause, fix approach, failed approaches per error ID.
knowledge/error_index.md.summary: Error Index catalogs all discovered ERR-XXX bugs with their failed approaches and attempted fixes to prevent repeating debugging work.
key_claims: each entry records bug ID, title, and chronological fix attempts
Failed Approaches section documents what did not work
prevents agent from trying identical debug paths twice
referenced by error protocol R9 before starting new debug

knowledge/topic_registry.json.description: Controlled vocabulary for topic-graph backlink system â€” 20 closed topics agents must use when assigning topics[] to files
knowledge/topic_registry.json.summary: Topic registry defines closed vocabulary of valid topics that agents must use for tagging files, preventing free-text tags and enabling semantic backlink analysis.
key_claims: closed vocabulary enforced strictly with no free-text tags allowed
agents must assign topics only from official list in this file
topics enable topic overlap computation in backlink_analyzer
version field tracks schema updates to topic definitions

scripts/backlink_analyzer.py.description: Computes topic-graph related[] entries in index_files.json based on pairwise topic overlap (|Aâˆ©B|/|A| >= 0.5). Flags: --dry-run, --min-overlap, --show-matrix.
scripts/backlink_analyzer.py.summary: Backlink analyzer computes related array entries in index_files.json by measuring topic overlap between files and categorizing relationship strength.
key_claims: overlap formula divides intersection size by source file topic count
strong relationship threshold set at overlap greater than or equal to 1.0
related relationship threshold set at overlap between 0.5 and 1.0
generates related array of files with semantic overlap

.agents/skills/harness/harness_doctor/SK.description: Detailed procedures for harness_doctor sections 1-5: Diagnosis, Audit, Proposal, Approval Gate, Execute+Verify. Includes Python snippets for index_cfp_fix.json operations.

Step 4 appends fix attempt to CODING_FAILURE_PATTERNS metadata
resolution status updated to resolved-pending at completion

scripts/bootstrap_sessions.py.description: Initializes .sessions/ from docs/session_templates/ on first run. Flags: --force (overwrite), --dry-run (list without write). Used in target project setup (Implement/02_setup.md Step 5).
scripts/bootstrap_sessions.py.summary: Bootstrap sessions initializes .sessions/ directory from templates on first clone or fresh environment, skipping existing files unless --force flag provided.

skips files that already exist unless --force specified
mece_plan_schema.md template renamed to mece_plan.md on copy

docs/session_templates.description: 7 template files for .sessions/ initialization: active_thread, mece_plan_schema, gather_complete, session_handoff, compact_state, session_tokens, self_improve_log. Committed to repo so fresh clones have schema reference.

templates enforce consistent session state format across all agents
Phase 0 block required for PreToolUse hook validation to pass

scripts/session_compactor.py.description: Session health gate before git commit/push. Validates .sessions/ has all 8 required files, correct fields, and active_thread.md phase != in_progress. Called by identity/SKILL.md Fatal Constraint. Exit 0=STATUS:OK, Exit 1=STATUS:FAIL.
scripts/session_compactor.py.summary: Session compactor validates .sessions/ health before git commits by checking file presence and phase state, blocking commits when phase is in_progress.
key_claims: exit code zero means safe to commit all checks pass
exit code one means checks failed do not commit
blocks commits when active_thread.md phase equals in_progress
checks for required fields in all session metadata files

scripts/safe_run.py.description: Priority-first chunked output filter (T-042). THRESHOLD=40, CHUNK=25. Signal lines first, never truncated. Noise lines (non-monotonic) removed. Short output pass-through.
scripts/safe_run.py.summary: Safe run is priority-first chunked output filter that limits token waste by extracting signal lines and truncating non-signal output with threshold configuration.
key_claims: output greater than THRESHOLD lines triggers filtering behavior
signal lines error warn fail exception traceback sent first never truncated
non-signal lines reduced to first CHUNK_SIZE lines plus remainder count
THRESHOLD set to 40 CHUNK_SIZE set to 25 in default configuration

docs/token_benchmark.md.description: Token optimization benchmark â€” before/after safe_run.py comparison for 3 scenarios. Projects 45-65% reduction for T-041-equivalent tasks.
docs/token_benchmark.md.summary: Token benchmark documents token optimization results from T-042 through T-046 showing 73% waste reduction on git output and 20.5% formula accuracy gap breakdown.
key_claims: Test A git output reduced 100 lines to 27 lines saving 438 tokens
Test B error storm reduced non-monotonic output from 156 to 40 lines
T-044 improved accuracy from 1.49x to 1.26x undercount ratio
remaining 20.5% gap caused by triangular accumulation of history

scripts/knowledge_conflict_checker.py.description: Stage 1 knowledge conflict checker â€” pure Python, 0 LLM tokens. Computes review_priority_score from topic overlap + phrase matching. Returns structured JSON for agent review.
scripts/knowledge_conflict_checker.py.summary: Knowledge conflict checker detects potential contradictions between files using topic overlap analysis and phrase-level matching, returning verdict for agent review.
key_claims: clean verdict when no related files with overlap greater than minimum
low_priority verdict when related files exist without phrase matches
review_recommended verdict when related files contain matching phrases
exit code zero for clean or low_priority exit code one for review

scripts/write_context_cache.sh.description: Stop hook script â€” writes compact context snapshot to .sessions/session_context_cache.md and appends 1 JSON line to .sessions/token_log.jsonl every time Claude stops.

Appends one JSON line to token_log.jsonl with ts, task, phase, session_total, chat_total, cache counters

Called by .claude/settings.json Stop hook with 10s timeout

scripts/backfill_knowledge_index.py.description: One-time backfill script for knowledge/index_files.json â€” extracts scaled excerpts (60L cap) and writes agent-generated summary/key_claims. Also auto-detects supersedes chain from _YYYYMMDD.md filename pattern.
scripts/backfill_knowledge_index.py.summary: Backfill knowledge index populates summary and key_claims fields in index_files.json using three-step workflow with no SDK tokens via pure Python extraction.

knowledge/9arm-skills-writing-techniques.description: Deep dive: 9arm-skills writing techniques with concrete examples â€” Operating Stance, When NOT to Use, Cross-Skill Composition, Tone Guide, Quality Heuristics. Discipline vs Enforcement model comparison.
key_claims: Operating Stance teaches LLM how to think; handles edge cases without explicit rules
When NOT to Use prevents skill misuse through contextual negative space
Cross-skill composition reduces user cognitive load to zero
Tone Guide ensures output consistency across sessions without enforcement
Discipline model wins for judgment calls; Enforcement model wins for invariants

knowledge/harness-agent-skill-system-fra.description: Complete reference: 18 Harness Agent skills by tier, 13 framework components with decision rules and annotated examples, comparison with 9arm-skills framework.
key_claims: Harness Agent has 18 skills across 3 tiers: Core Execution, Supporting, Specialized Output
13 framework components â€” 7 mandatory in all skills, 6 conditional
BC blocks used only for irreversible/destructive actions, not judgment calls
Minimal skill = 6 mandatory components (~50L); full skill = all 13 (~150-180L)

knowledge/9arm-skills-skill-building-fra.description: 9arm-skills skill building framework â€” 8 components, decision table, blank template, step-by-step guide for writing new skills in the 9arm style.
key_claims: 9arm-skills framework has 8 components â€” 4 always required, 4 conditional
YAML Header must embed trigger keywords in description, not just summarize
When NOT to Use prevents misuse without enforcement â€” as important as When to Invoke
Operating Stance replaces edge-case rules with transferable mindset
Minimal skill ~30-40L uses 5 components; full skill ~130L uses all 8
6 cross-skill connection types: Text Reference, Mandatory+Wait, BC-Gated, On-Demand, Proactive Offer, Input Sourcing
Types 1+5+6 always appropriate; Types 2+3 only for irreversible/data-integrity scenarios

knowledge/audit_engine_rubric.md.description: Shared file-agnostic audit engine â€” Operating Stance, verdict format, Stop conditions (Class A/B), Failure-Mode awareness, Tier & effort, Structure Audit, Re-audit, Escalation. Referenced by skill_auditor and harness_doc_auditor.
key_claims: Single source of truth for the file-agnostic part of any audit skill
Each auditor adds ONLY its file-type-specific checklist on top of this engine
Extracted from skill_auditor SKILL.md (T-179-S1, 2026-06-12)

.agents/skills/harness/harness_doc_audit.description: harness_doc_auditor â€” audits rule/directive .md files (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, INVARIANTS.md, REPO_MAP.md, Implement/*.md, mece_plan_schema.md) against an 8-item directive rubric on top of the shared audit engine. Declines SKILL.md (â†’ skill_auditor) and src/ (â†’ harness_editor).
key_claims: 8-item rubric: contradiction, scatter, ambiguous-trigger, dead-ref, token-density, low-tier-followability, gate/BC-correctness, link-validity
Most scope files are Never-Full-Load â†’ mandates grep-walk in windows, never full Read
Gate/BC item is two-sided: flags over-enforcement (gate on judgment) AND under-enforcement (destructive action with no gate)
References knowledge/audit_engine_rubric.md for the file-agnostic engine

.agents/skills/harness/skill_auditor/SKI.description: skill_auditor â€” audits any SKILL.md against 9arm framework: 8 components, 6 connection types, BC over-enforcement detection. Produces verdict table + ready-to-paste suggested additions.
key_claims: Audits 8 components: YAML Header, When to Invoke, When NOT to Use, Operating Stance, Prerequisites, Workflow, Output Spec, Hard Rules
Flags BC over-enforcement â€” BC count > 2 with no irreversible action = [over-enforcement]
Suggested Additions must be real text, not descriptions of what to write
Input sourcing: reads prior audit runs from exec_log to avoid re-flagging fixed issues

scripts/verify_runner.py.purpose: Parses Verify-N lines from mece_plan.md and runs each as bash command, reporting PASS/FAIL per section

scripts/session_close.py.purpose: 5-file session close automation â€” writes session JSON, tokens, thread, handoff, runs session_indexer

scripts/compute_compact_size.py.description: compact_size single source â€” prints int(CHAT_TOTAL * RETENTION=0.52) read from session_tokens.md. SSOT for the compact_size constant (Phase B); replaced 4 inline copies, one of which was broken (import open as o).
scripts/compute_compact_size.py.summary: Single source of truth for the compact_size formula compact_size = int(CHAT_TOTAL * 0.52). The retention constant (calibration history 0.30 -> 0.45 -> 0.52) lives only here; the MECE close sequence, Implement/03_config.md, and token_tracker invoke this script instead of duplicating the literal.
key_claims: compact_size equals int of CHAT_TOTAL times retention constant 0.52
the retention constant lives only in this script which is the single source
callers invoke the script instead of copying the multiplier
reads CHAT_TOTAL from .sessions/session_tokens.md and returns 0 when the file is missing

knowledge/behave_test_log.jsonl.description: Stage 3.5 behavioral-verify run log + regression suite (T-161) â€” one JSON record per spawn-test of an edited harness rule

scripts/posttool_track.py.description: PostToolUse hook tracker (T-177/CFP-028 fix) â€” increments LOOP_WEIGHT + estimates tool-I/O chars to accumulate SESSION_TOTAL+CHAT_TOTAL atomically per tool call. Fail-safe. Wired in .claude/settings.json PostToolUse.

scripts/rule_indexer.py.description: Auto-generate cross-file rule map: extracts R/T/CFP/ERR/BC tokens from harness files, classifies defined vs referenced, writes rules_defined[]/rules_referenced[] into index_files.json. Cache only; files stay source of truth. Powers audit_engine_rubric.md Â§6 Scan D (T-182).
scripts/rule_indexer.py.summary: CACHE generator for the harness rule map; regenerate after rule edits; never hand-edit the two fields.

scripts/index_reconcile.py.description: Session-close index drift net (T-183): diffs git changes vs index_files.json keys, emits [index-drift] for stale/missing entries, computes regen plan for idempotent indexers. Fail-safe (always exit 0, never blocks Stop hook). Wired to Stop hook in .claude/settings.json.
scripts/index_reconcile.py.summary: Stop-hook safety net that catches forgotten R8 index updates at session close.

.agents/skills/harness/harness_editor/SK.description: BC Selection Guide Detail â€” decision tree, per-tier examples, anti-patterns for harness_editor

knowledge/llm-api-pricing-comparison-202.description: LLM API pricing comparison table (OpenAI/Anthropic/Google) Jun 2026 â€” rates, cache mechanics, gotchas, coding-agent scores

scripts/repo_map_check.py.description: REPO_MAP.md drift detector (T-185) â€” flags top-level files/dirs added/removed vs curated map; --append adds placeholder rows, never overwrites curated descriptions

knowledge/topic_facet_schema.md.description: Topic-Facet Backlink Schema v2 â€” 2-facet (type+topic) per-file weighted model, AI-tag-once determinism (hash-lock), weighted link-strength formula.

scripts/boot_init.sh.description: Boot step B1 â€” compact-restore check + SESSION/CHAT/LOOP_WEIGHT reset in session_tokens.md + active_thread tail + roadmap [/] + CFP_COUNT. Extracted from inline AGENTS.md bash (T-212/D1). Mirrors compact_reset.py CHAT formula â€” KEEP IN SYNC.

.agents/skills/coding/delegate/SKILL.md.description: Delegate skill â€” hands a confirmed, mechanical, self-contained MECE Phase-3 section to a cheap Haiku sub-agent instead of running it in main context. Self-verify always mandatory; retry-once-then-escalate to MODEL_MEDIUM. Refuses planning/judgment/security/R14-R15-gated paths.
.agents/skills/coding/delegate/SKILL.md.summary: Ports the 9arm qwen-agent delegation pattern to house style: a passed MECE section IS the standalone prompt; spawn Agent with model=model_low (Haiku resolved from detected.md), run the section Verify-N in main context, auto-retry once, then escalate. Never delegates gated/judgment work.
key_claims: a confirmed mechanical MECE section is the standalone delegate prompt
self-verify via the section Verify-N is always mandatory
one retry then escalate to MODEL_MEDIUM + emit [delegate-escalated]
resolve model id from detected.md model_low â€” never hardcode
never delegate R14/R15-gated paths or work needing chat context

docs/session_templates/handoff_block_sch.description: Canonical spec for the ## hand-off block â€” skill chaining hand-off contracts (T-216 D5): producer->consumer artifact chains + standard INDEX variant. Single-source rule (T-202), required-inputs gate, on-missing HALT / on-present flow.

scripts/tok.py.description: Per-file token estimator (pull helper, T-247) â€” answers "how many tokens to load this file?" before reading. Ratio single-sourced from token_estimator (EN_MULT/THAI_MULT). Supports --lines N partial-read predictor. Callable via Bash.

knowledge/glossary.md.description: On-demand term->plain-Thai glossary (T-229). One line per term: term(lowercase) | plain-Thai gloss | optional analogy. grep-only â€” NEVER always-loaded (T-226e). Appended by user-coach when a term is glossed; grepped first on recurrence to reuse the stored wording.

knowledge/out_of_scope.md.description: Design-DECISION rejection log (T-224): settled "we decided NOT to build X" debates with problem/rationale/refs/keywords per rejected idea. Complements CFP (bugs). Grep-first read + append-on-reject via skeptical_reviewer M4.5 gate. NEVER always-loaded. Seeded with 6 rejected ideas from roadmap 815 (a-f).

scripts/git_guard.py.purpose: PreToolUse(Bash) git-guardrails hook (T-227): blocks 4 dangerous git patterns (force-push, reset --hard, clean -f, branch -D) with exit 2 before they run; shlex-tokenized command-position match, fail-open on parse error, GIT_GUARD_OK=1 opt-in override.

.agents/skills/knowledge/index_manager/S.description: Index Manager skill (T-238 merge) â€” maintains both knowledge indices via a mode split. mode:symbol -> index_variables.json (cross-file symbol defs + used_in). mode:file -> index_files.json (file lifecycle + backlinks). Caller-driven, index-only.

knowledge/user_modeling_grounding.md.description: Grounding spec for T-253 user-modeling / potential-development system â€” design rationale extending the T-225 user-coach store with a person model + coach layer: behaviors-not-labels, two-tier append-log + one-page top-sheet, self-report-as-provisional epistemics, lightweight readiness gate, and a situational-leadership verbosity dial.

knowledge/user_learning_profile.json.description: Canonical single-source store for the user-modeling system (schema_version 2) â€” person self-report, confirmed/provisional traits with tally, per-topic mastery + quiz history, weak/strong areas and dev_path. Read/written by scripts/learning_profile.py; surfaced each turn via the [learning-state] hook line.

knowledge/obsidian-style-graph-knowledge.description: Research note: building an OFFLINE single-file HTML backlink graph (Obsidian-style) of repo files, colored by topic. Key finding: index_files.json already holds nodes/edges(backlinks,references,related)/color(topics) â€” it is a rendering problem, not a data problem. Library comparison (force-graph wins at ~2400 nodes Canvas); ref repos quartz/ObsidianHtml. Frames the graph as the human-facing read-model of the agent index + a harness-health audit (orphan/hub/cluster) + GraphRAG adjacency.

knowledge/karpathy-llm-wiki-pattern-2026.description: Research note on Karpathy LLM-Wiki gist (gist 442a6bf): LLM incrementally builds+maintains an interlinked markdown knowledge base (vs RAG re-deriving each query). 3 layers (raw sources / wiki / schema=CLAUDE.md+AGENTS.md, named explicitly) Â· 3 ops (ingest/query/lint) Â· index.md+log.md, no embeddings at moderate scale. KEY: maps ~80% onto our harness (knowledge/+memory = wiki, index_files.json = index, index_reconcile/scrutinize = lint, the planned backlink graph = Obsidian graph view). Gaps to adopt: immutable raw-sources layer, inline contradiction-flagging, page frontmatter, qmd search at scale.

knowledge/wiki-index-integrity-audit-202.description: Verified audit: LLM-wiki index/backlink sync leaks on ADD (honor-system, no enroll script; index_reconcile.py:262/384 only PRINTS [index-drift] missing, never inserts; detector uses git status --porcelain=this-session so committed files leak forever â†’ root cause of 76 missing entries). DELETE enforced (--check exit 2), EDIT drifts (topics never re-extracted), RENAME asymmetric. Fix: make reconciler ENROLL over git ls-files. Prioritized fix plan inside.

knowledge/wiki-index-sync-diagram-guide-.description: Visual guide (companion to the integrity audit): flow diagram of how a new file reaches the index. Two columns current(leaky) vs fixed(complete); only steps 3-4 differ â€” detection porcelain->git ls-files, missing-file print->auto-enroll stub. Core principle: ADD path moves from honor-system to enforced/automatic (same reason DELETE never leaks). References the SVG + scripts/index_reconcile.py. Ties to roadmap T-269.

knowledge/diagrams/wiki-index-sync-curre.description: Standalone SVG: Wiki index sync current(leaky) vs fixed(complete) flow â€” the 4-step ADD-to-index path, steps 3-4 are the T-269 fix points (git ls-files + auto-enroll).

scripts/build_backlink_graph.py.description: Generator (single source of truth) â€” reads knowledge/index_files.json and emits a self-contained OFFLINE HTML backlink graph (Obsidian-style force-directed view) to knowledge/diagrams/backlink-graph.html. Hand-written canvas force sim (no CDN), topic-cluster layout, score-threshold slider, click-to-focus, search, legend; Plus panel adds force sliders + settle/orphan/arrows toggles. Click-to-read detail panel (T-274): per-node embedded description preview, clickable neighbour navigation (walk backlinks in-graph), open-raw-file link. Deterministic/idempotent output. (T-273, T-274)

knowledge/diagrams/backlink-graph.html.description: Generated offline artifact (do NOT hand-edit) â€” self-contained interactive backlink graph of the knowledge base, 209 nodes / 1202 deduped edges, color-by-topic, built by scripts/build_backlink_graph.py. Open directly in a browser; zero network refs. (T-273)
